name: Acorn Squash with Nutmeg
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon reduced-calorie margarine; melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash into quarters, removing the seeds.
2. Place the squash, cut side up, in a shallow baking dish. Add boiling water to a depth of about 1/2 inch.
3. Cover and bake at 400 degrees F for 30 minutes or until tender.
4. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
5. Divide the mixture among the squash cavities.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 400 degrees F for an additional 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Yield: 4 servings (approximately 70 calories per serving).
